metadata.title: Boriyad Youth Academy
metadata.description: Premier KG–Grade 12 international school in Ethiopia. Shaping Ethiopia's next generation of leaders through rigorous academics, character, and global citizenship.
metadata.tagline: Preparing the Future Generations for Success in a changing World!

hero.subtitle: Boriyad Youth Academy provides world-class education from Kindergarten to Grade 12, inspiring young minds to excel academically, lead confidently, and impact the world.

aboutPreview.title: More Than a School, a Family
aboutPreview.description: Boriyad Youth Academy nurtures character, talent, and intellect from Kindergarten to Grade 12. We partner with families to develop confident, compassionate, and future-ready leaders.

why.title: Where Excellence Meets Purpose
why.description: We don't just teach subjects — we cultivate thinkers, leaders, and citizens prepared for a changing world.

faculty.title: World-Class Faculty
faculty.description: Educators trained in international pedagogy with deep commitment to every learner.

holistic.title: Holistic Development
holistic.description: Academics balanced with arts, athletics, service, and character formation.

global.title: Global Perspective
global.description: Multilingual environment preparing students for universities worldwide.

outcomes.title: Proven Outcomes
outcomes.description: Consistent top national exam results and international university admissions.

programs.title: Programs for Every Stage
programs.description: From early years through university preparation — a coherent journey of discovery and mastery.

items.title: Early Years (KG)
items.description: Play-based inquiry nurturing curiosity, literacy foundations, and social confidence.

items.title: Primary School
items.description: Core competencies in literacy, numeracy, science, and Ethiopian heritage with global standards.

items.title: Middle School
items.description: Critical thinking, STEM labs, languages, and leadership through project-based learning.

items.title: High School
items.description: IGCSE-aligned pathways, university counseling, and competitive exam preparation.

studentLife.title: Beyond the Classroom
studentLife.description: A vibrant campus where passions flourish and lifelong friendships form.

highlights.title: Arts & Culture
highlights.desc: Music, visual arts, drama, and annual cultural celebrations.

highlights.title: Athletics
highlights.desc: Football, basketball, track, and inter-school competitions.

highlights.title: Clubs & Leadership
highlights.desc: Debate, robotics, Model UN, and student council.

highlights.title: Service Learning
highlights.desc: Community outreach building empathy and civic responsibility.

results.title: Results That Speak
results.description: Consistent national exam excellence and international university placements year after year.

testimonials.title: Trusted by Families & Educators
testimonials.description: Hear from our community about the BYA difference.

items.quote: BYA gave our daughter the confidence and academic rigor to earn a full scholarship abroad. The teachers truly see each child.
items.name: Mrs. Almaz T.

items.quote: The science labs and debate program prepared me for university in ways no other school in Addis could match.
items.name: Daniel M.

items.quote: As an educator, the professional culture and resources here rival international schools I've worked in globally.
items.name: Dr. Samuel K.

items.title: BYA Students Sweep National Science Fair
items.excerpt: Three gold medals and two special awards at the 2025 National Science Olympiad.

items.title: New Cambridge Assessment Partnership
items.excerpt: Expanded IGCSE pathways and examiner training for our faculty.

items.title: Spring Open Day — Register Now
items.excerpt: Tour our campus, meet faculty, and experience a day at BYA.

admissions.title: Your Journey Starts Here
admissions.description: A transparent, supportive process designed for families seeking excellence.

steps.title: Inquiry
steps.description: Submit the online form or visit our admissions office.

steps.title: Campus Visit
steps.description: Tour facilities and meet with our academic team.

steps.title: Enrollment
steps.description: Receive offer, complete registration, and join BYA.

cta.title: Give Your Child the Education They Deserve
cta.description: Limited places available for the 2025–2026 academic year. Schedule a campus visit or apply online today.

meta.title: About
meta.description: Discover Boriyad Youth Academy's mission, values, and legacy of educational excellence in Ethiopia.

hero.title: A Legacy of Excellence
hero.description: Since our founding, Boriyad Youth Academy has prepared students for success in a changing world — with integrity, rigor, and heart.

story.title: Preparing Future Generations
story.description: Founded in Addis Ababa, BYA serves families seeking an education that rivals the world's finest institutions while honoring Ethiopian heritage and values.
story.body: Our trilingual community — Oromo, Amharic, and English — reflects the diversity of modern Ethiopia. We invest in exceptional teachers, modern facilities, and a culture where every student is known, challenged, and supported.

mission.title: Education with Purpose
mission.description: We cultivate intellect, character, and leadership — graduates who contribute to Ethiopia and the world.
mission.mission: Deliver world-class KG–12 education that develops the whole child.
mission.vision: Be Ethiopia's most respected youth academy, known for outcomes and integrity.
mission.values: Excellence, respect, curiosity, service, and global citizenship.

meta.title: Academics
meta.description: Explore BYA's KG–Grade 12 programs, curriculum pathways, and university preparation.

hero.title: Rigorous. Relevant. Remarkable.
hero.description: A coherent curriculum from early years through university preparation, aligned with international standards.

programs.title: Learning Pathways
programs.description: Each stage builds on the last — developing skills, knowledge, and character.

enrichment.title: Enrichment & Support
enrichment.description: STEM labs, languages, arts, counseling, and university guidance integrated throughout.

meta.title: Admissions
meta.description: Apply to Boriyad Youth Academy. Learn about our admissions process for KG through Grade 12.

hero.title: Join the BYA Community
hero.description: We welcome families who share our commitment to excellence. Limited places for 2025–2026.

process.title: How to Apply
process.description: Four simple steps from inquiry to enrollment.

form.title: Start Your Application
form.description: Complete the form and our admissions team will be in touch within 2 business days.
form.successMessage: Your inquiry has been received. Our admissions team will contact you within 2 business days.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

apply.metaDescription: Submit your admission application to Boriyad Youth Academy.
apply.title: Begin Your Application
apply.description: Complete this secure form to apply for KG through Grade 12. Our admissions office will review your application promptly.

success.title: Application Submitted Successfully
success.message: Our admissions office will contact you. Please save your reference ID below.

meta.title: Student Life
meta.description: Campus life at BYA — arts, athletics, clubs, and leadership opportunities.

hero.title: A Campus Alive with Possibility
hero.description: Where students discover passions, build friendships, and grow as leaders.

items.title: Performing Arts
items.desc: Annual productions, choir, and instrumental programs.

items.title: Sports
items.desc: Inter-school leagues in football, basketball, athletics, and more.

items.title: STEM Clubs
items.desc: Robotics, coding, and science olympiad teams.

items.title: Leadership
items.desc: Student council, debate, Model UN, and peer mentoring.

items.title: Community Service
items.desc: Partnerships with local organizations and outreach projects.

items.title: House System
items.desc: Friendly competition fostering belonging and school spirit.

meta.description: BYA national exam results, IGCSE achievements, and university placements.

hero.title: Excellence You Can Measure
hero.description: Year after year, our students achieve outstanding outcomes on national and international examinations.

placements.title: Graduates Around the World
placements.description: Recent BYA alumni have been accepted to leading universities in Ethiopia, the UK, USA, and beyond.
